name: OpenWatchParty (Develop)
description: Watch movies together in sync with friends on Jellyfin
overview: Rolling development build of OpenWatchParty, rebuilt automatically from the develop branch. Unstable — for testers only.

versions.changelog:
fix(plugin): match injected-client filter on prefix, not exact string

The exact-match filter added for Jellyfin Web/Media Player never matched
in practice: real SessionInfo.Client values carry a trailing version
(JellyfinWeb10.11.11, JellyfinDesktop3.0.0-dev — JMP appears
renamed to JellyfinDesktop), confirmed via Dashboard > Active Devices
on a live server. Switch to a prefix match so the version is effectively
a wildcard, and add JellyfinDesktop to the excluded list.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
